title: Yuning
description: Yuning Liu is a Professor of Practice in Mathematics at NYU Shanghai. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, he was postdoc at Universität Regensburg, Germany. He holds a PhD from Institut Élie Cartan Nancy, France.
text:
Yuning Liu
